name: Earthquake Cake and Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9x13 inch baking pan.
3. Mix German Chocolate cake mix according to box directions and pour into the prepared pan.
4. In a separate bowl, combine softened butter (1 stick), cream cheese (8 oz), and powdered sugar (1 pound). Spoon dollops on top of the cake batter.
5. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F (175°C).
6. Turn off the oven and let cool completely before serving.
